CustomField.description: Fields (one per line) from the tracked object to include as extra columns in the alert email table or CSV, placed between Record Id and the changed Field column. Example: Name, ISIN__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter field API names one per line. These fields will appear as context columns (e.g. Name, ISIN__c) between the Record Id link and the Field that changed.
CustomField.label: Context Fields
